## Summary

A short description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no functional changes)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and it passes
- [ ] My changes work in `npm run dev`
- [ ] For Cloudflare-specific changes (stats, KV, Workers): I tested with `npm run preview`
- [ ] I have updated or added relevant documentation
- [ ] For new GitLab instances: I tested the instance is publicly accessible and returns results
- [ ] For UI changes: I have included before/after screenshots below
